description: Agience Organization — a legal entity or operator record used for identity, governance, and licensing decisions.

identity.description: Stable organization identity and public profile.

agience_root_id.description: Stable root artifact identifier for the organization artifact.

legal_name.description: Registered legal name of the entity or operator.

display_name.description: Optional human-friendly name shown in the UI.

entity_kind.description: Licensing-relevant entity class. Examples: individual, nonprofit, educational, company, government.

jurisdiction.description: Optional jurisdiction or place of incorporation.

website_uri.description: Optional public website or primary domain.

licensing.description: Canonical fields used by Ophan to make deterministic licensing-boundary decisions.

employee_count.description: Current employee count for the legal entity.

annual_gross_revenue_usd.description: Annual gross revenue for the legal entity in USD.

packaging.description: Business-model flags relevant to the public license boundary.

relationships.description: Optional direct references to related organizations used for deterministic policy evaluation.

affiliate_organization_ids.description: Referenced organization artifact IDs whose revenue should be included in affiliate aggregation.

ui.label: Organization
ui.description: Canonical operator or legal-entity record used for governance and licensing decisions.
